div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Greek Minister (Sicilianos)
div.p: Sir: At the request of the United States Treasury Department, I have the honor to notify your Government that on November 6, 1936, there was deposited with the Federal Reserve Bank of New York for credit to the account of the Treasurer of the United States, the sum of $87,168 by the Bank of Greece for account of the Government of Greece as a partial payment of interest due from that Government to the United States. The Treasury applied these funds to the payment of 40 percent of the semiannual interest amounting to $217,920 due November 10, 1936, on the 4% loan of 1929.
